title: Get Ya' Tanks Here
description: Adds fluid tanks of various materials.
body:
Gyth

This mod adds a fluid tank which can be used to store water, lava, and other modded fluids. There are several tiers to the tank, each tier having a greater capacity than the previous. Only tier 1 tanks can be crafted initially, however there are upgrade items which can be applied to raise the tier of a tank. For a tier to be applicable, it must be applied on a tank that is the same tier level, or one higher. 

Tier 1 Tank Recipes

Some Upgrade Recipes
